AI.reason_available: This IP's geographic region and network type conform to normal access policies.
AI.reason_restricted: This IP belongs to a cloud provider or hosting facility. It may trigger CAPTCHAs, require human verification, or face rate limits.
AI.reason_blocked: The service is officially unavailable in this IP's country/region, or the service's security firewall has blocked this hosting/datacenter range.

Errors.title: Analysis Error
Errors.desc: Unable to fetch or parse geographical and security data for target IP. Please check your connection or try another address.
Errors.not_found_desc: The page you are looking for does not exist or the IP analysis report has expired.
